description: A plain documentary/candid photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) showing a deportation/removal flight operation on an airport tarmac. A line of roughly a dozen detained men in civilian clothes (hoodies, jeans, sweatshirts) walk single-file up a metal ramp toward the open rear cargo door of a large grey U.S. military transport aircraft (a C-17-style cargo plane). A camouflage-uniformed soldier/guard stands at the top of the ramp and another armed personnel member in tan/khaki tactical gear stands at right; a CBP officer in green uniform (with a visible agency patch) watches from the far right. In the background is a yellow 'JET FUEL' refueling truck with a hazardous-materials placard, and the wing/engine of the aircraft frames the top of the image under an overcast sky. Although DHS uses it for messaging (the tweet promotes the CBP Home self-deportation app and warns of arrest/deportation), the image itself is an unedited candid news-style photo with no designed slogan, typography, or meme styling, so it is not a designed graphic.
